name: Magnolia Tee Indoor Golf Club
about: Magnolia Tee Indoor Golf Simulator is a locally owned and operated indoor golf facility in Ridgeland, Mississippi, serving golfers from Jackson, Madison County, and Rankin County. The facility is designed to be an affordable and uncrowded indoor golf experience, utilizing a limited-membership model to ensure comfort and availability. Their technology centers on Uneekor EYE XO2 launch monitors and access to hundreds of virtual golf courses, providing detailed swing data and year-round play in a climate-controlled environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-level accuracy with Uneekor EYE XO2 launch monitors
Affordable pricing with a limited-membership model to avoid overcrowding
Year-round play in a comfortable, climate-controlled space
Hundreds of virtual golf courses available for play

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB is allowed; no on-site kitchen mentioned
BYOB is allowed; no on-site bar mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor providing detailed swing data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own golf clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverages), allowing you to bring your own food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Sessions may be booked up to 3 hours at a time, which is typically enough time to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is Magnolia Tee kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is welcoming to all golfers, including beginners, and describes itself as a community-oriented space suitable for families.
